head: 0230e583
observed_failure: GitHub Actions run 29667127450 reached the deploy script with node_modules untracked because repository ignore rules did not exclude it.
verified_recovery: The versioned .gitignore excludes node_modules while the deploy step keeps npm ci after pulling final main, preserving both clean-source and dependency alignment.
external_runtime_precondition: Cloudflare credentials were empty in run 29667127450 and must be configured before public deployment can be demonstrated.
